items.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
items.description: Users can now enable multi-factor authentication using email verification.

items.title: Export Dashboard Reports
items.description: Users can export dashboard reports to PDF format.

items.title: Improved Search Performance
items.description: Reduced search response times across the portal.

items.title: Password Reset Email Failure
items.description: Resolved an issue where password reset emails were not sent to some users.

items.title: Duplicate Notifications
items.description: Fixed an issue causing duplicate notifications to be displayed.

items.title: Database Index Optimization
items.description: Optimized database indexes for improved query performance.

items.title: Upgrade Logging Framework
items.description: Upgraded logging libraries to the latest version.
